title: coreopsis crassifolia
intro: Coreopsis crassifolia, also known as Rough Coreopsis, is a perennial plant species native to eastern North America, characterized by its hairy leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Coreopsis crassifolia is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
